bounded_violation        co-running-logging: violation at logging|running via [audit]
conditional_reachability shipped: satisfiable via [pay pack ship]
coverage                 coverage:
states: 4/10 (40.0%); uncovered [active canceled finished flushed logging running]
transitions: 3/7 (42.9%); uncovered [logging -flush-> flushed open -audit-> active open -cancel-> canceled running -done-> finished]
invariant                mutex(logging,running): violated at logging|running via [audit]
invariant                never(canceled): violated at canceled via [cancel]
liveness                 shipped: stuck at canceled via [cancel]
reachability             active: reachable via [audit]
reachability             canceled: reachable via [cancel]
reachability             finished: reachable via [audit]
reachability             flushed: reachable via [audit]
reachability             logging: reachable via [audit]
reachability             open: reachable via []
reachability             packaged: reachable via [pay pack]
reachability             processing: reachable via [pay]
reachability             running: reachable via [audit]
reachability             shipped: reachable via [pay pack ship]
